dimensions.rationale: The response correctly identified the core subscriptions and utility bills but incorrectly included a one-time Lyft charge as a recurring subscription, which was not supported by the transaction data.
The subscription bucket total was calculated incorrectly ($199.78 vs $171.98) due to the inclusion of the one-time Lyft charge. The utility bucket total was correct.
The response followed the requested structure but failed to identify the Microsoft wellness reimbursement opportunity for the ClassPass subscription, which was a key planted opportunity.
The response appropriately excluded rent from the totals and provided clear, safe disclosures.

missedOpportunities: Failed to identify that ClassPass is an eligible expense for the Microsoft $1,500 annual wellness reimbursement.
summary: The assistant correctly categorized most recurring charges but failed to identify the Microsoft wellness reimbursement opportunity and incorrectly included a one-time Lyft charge in the subscription total.
